name: Merry Spritz Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 Foil-wrapped bar NESTLE Premier White (2 oz)
9 oz NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate chips (Rainbow Morsels)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt the NESTLE Premier White baking bar. Set aside to cool slightly.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, sugar, and salt until creamy.
4. Blend in egg and vanilla extract.
5. Gradually blend in melted baking bar.
6. Gradually add flour. Mix until well combined.
7. Place dough in a cookie press fitted with the desired plate.
8. Press dough onto ungreased cookie sheets, decorating each shape with NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate chips (Rainbow Morsels).
9. Bake for 7-9 minutes or until set. Let cool for 1 minute on the cookie sheets before removing them.
10. Cool completely. Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
